description: §15.11.1 clean neg — `bind:propName=@var` targeting a prop declared WITH the `bind` keyword SHALL NOT fire E-COMPONENT-013. Incidental note: impl#1 currently still emits a spurious `E-ATTR-011` on this genuinely-valid form too (see the sPA-ss68 escalation report — same CE-does-not-strip-the-attribute root cause as the reject case); `notCodes` asserts only that E-COMPONENT-013 itself stays silent, which is the code under test here.
rationale: §15.11.1 fires E-COMPONENT-013 only when `bind:propName` targets a prop not declared `bind`. `Tag` declares `bind label: string`, so `bind:label=@v` targets a genuinely bindable prop.
